description: Clay Webhook OS architecture knowledge graph. Nodes represent modules, edges represent dependencies/relationships, flows trace request lifecycles, clusters group by architectural layer.

webhook_sync.name: Synchronous Webhook Execution
webhook_sync.description: Single skill execution via POST /webhook (sync mode). Clay row data flows through middleware, skill loading, context assembly, model routing, optional research pre-fetch, worker pool execution via claude --print, and returns JSON result with usage tracking.

webhook_async.name: Asynchronous Webhook Execution
webhook_async.description: Async skill execution via POST /webhook (async mode). Request is enqueued in job queue, worker picks it up, executes via worker pool, delivers result via callback URL, with retry on failure.

pipeline_execution.name: Pipeline Execution
pipeline_execution.description: Multi-step pipeline via POST /pipeline. Pipeline runner loads YAML definition, iterates skill chain, passes output of each step as input to the next, evaluates conditions, routes by confidence.

feedback_loop.name: Feedback Learning Loop
feedback_loop.description: User submits thumbs-down feedback. Learning engine extracts corrections and persists them as learnings. Future prompts via context_assembler include these learnings to improve output quality.
